macaroons-argiro.name: Macaroons
instructions: Preheat the evening to 170 °C.
Place anti-stick paper on two shallow sheet.
Place the ground almond in a large bowl.
Add the icing and the semolina.
Mix them well with the hand.
Pour with the flowerwater and melted butter.
In another bowl, add the whites and salt.
Beat them with the wire or with the hand mixer at a medium speed for 3-4 minutes until they swell.
Add the yolk and the vanillas and beat with the mixer incorporated into the mixture.
Add them to the mixture of solid materials.
We knead with the hand, with gentle movements to combine the two mixtures into one dough.
Cover the dough with a clean towel.
Let it stand and dry a bit (about 1 hour).
We make small, long almonds like pears. If the dough sticks, dip your hands in flowerwater.
Add them to the sheets and bake them for about 25 minutes until slightly golden. To get rid of the parchment paper, take it lightly from the reverse with our palm.
Allow them to cool completely and brush with a brush and roll them into the icing, to combine well with sugar.
We can wrap them in a kitchen membrane or offer them to candy cards.

mango-and-lavender-puff-pastry-cake-lezz.name: Mango And Lavender Puff Pastry Cake
instructions: 1. Mix half-liter milk, sugar, vanilla and butter until boiling in a pot.
2. Remove flour, eggs and remaining milk until smooth.
3. Mix thoroughly by adding the prepared unlu mixture to the mixture of venbsp;silky mixture.
4. Continue cooking until all materials are mixed together.
5. Cook the condensed mixture for 2-3 minutes and wait to cool.
6. Unleassembles on the countertop and open the desired thickness in square format.
7. Bake and cool until 180 degree in the oven.
8. You can start the structure of the cake when the milföyler cools completely.
9. Place a piece of milföy before the base of the small square mold.
10. Remove the cream you prepared on it with the help of the spatula.
11. 11. Add mango, lavender and minted inner mortar to small parts and add other milfe on it.
12. Add it from fruity mortar by plastering again with cream.
12. August Remove from mold by adding the highest layer of milföy.
14 July Serve with powder sugar and fresh mint leaves.

maple-glazed-carrots.name: Maple-glazed Carrots
instructions: Place rack in middle of oven and preheat oven to 400°. Line a rimmed baking sheet with 3 sheets of foil (you’ll need it!). Cut 2 lb. medium carrots, tops trimmed to about ½", scrubbed, on a diagonal into 3" pieces (halved or quartered lengthwise if large).

Spread out carrots on foil. Evenly top with 6 Tbsp. unsalted butter, cut into pieces, ⅓ cup (packed; 70 g) light brown sugar, ⅓ cup pure maple syrup, and ¾ tsp. crushed red pepper flakes. Season with kosher salt and toss to combine.

Roast carrots, tossing every 20 minutes, until tender and browned around the edges, 50–60 minutes. Transfer to a platter (with syrup, if desired). Sprinkle with flaky sea salt (if using). 

Editor’s note: This recipe for maple-glazed carrots was first printed in November 2018. Head this way for more of our best carrot recipes →

mapo-tofu-salad.name: Mapo Tofu Salad

ingredients.prep: drained, patted dry, and cut into 1" (2.5 cm) cubes
core removed and cut into 1" (2.5 cm) chunks
or  0.5 tsp. red chile flakes, to taste

instructions: In a small bowl, combine 1 Tbsp. doubanjiang or black bean sauce, 1 tsp. sugar, and 2 Tbsp. hot water and stir until the sugar is dissolved and the doubanjiang has broken up. Add 1 garlic clove, grated, one 1" (2.5 cm) piece fresh ginger, peeled and grated, ½–1 tsp. Sichuan peppercorns, crushed, to taste, 1 Tbsp. sesame oil, 1 Tbsp. neutral oil, such as sunflower or grapeseed, 2 tsp. rice vinegar, and ½ tsp. sea salt and stir to combine. Stir until the mixture is pourable and loose. If it’s too thick or spicy, add another 1–2 tsp. water.

In a large baking dish or rimmed plate, scatter ⅓ cup (60 g) cornstarch or potato starch, season it with 1 tsp. sea salt and a few pinches of black pepper and toss to combine. Add one 14-oz./400 g block extra-firm tofu, drained, patted dry, and cut into 1" (2.5 cm) cubes, and, using your hands, gently toss to coat all sides, shaking off any excess. Set aside.

Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat until hot. Add 1–2 Tbsp. neutral oil, such as sunflower or grapeseed, ½ small (about 1 lb./450 g) cabbage, core removed and cut into 1" (2.5 cm) chunks, and 1 or 2 dried whole chiles, or ½ tsp. red chile flakes, to taste, and season well with salt and pepper. Toss until the cabbage is softened but still with some bite, 5–7 minutes. Add 1 garlic clove, grated, 3 tsp. rice or black vinegar, and 1 tsp. sesame oil and toss until combined, another 30–60 seconds. Taste and season with a little more salt and pepper if needed. Transfer to a large serving plate or platter to cool. If needed, wipe out the pan.

In the same skillet, heat 2–3 Tbsp. neutral oil over medium-high heat until it shimmers (this should take only 15–20 seconds if the pan is already hot). Reduce the heat to medium, and working in batches, fry the tofu on all sides until golden brown, 2–3 minutes per side. Drain on paper towel. Continue until all the tofu is cooked.
Place the tofu on top of the cabbage. Drizzle the mapo sauce all over and gently toss. Top with 1 Tbsp. toasted white sesame seeds and 2 scallions, finely sliced. Serve immediately.

maraschino-cherry-parfaits.name: Maraschino Cherry Parfaits
instructions: Set a mesh sieve over a medium bowl. Bring cherries, sugar, lemon juice, and ⅔ cup water to a simmer in a large saucepan over medium-low heat, stirring occasionally; cook until cherries have released their juices and are softened but still intact, 20–25 minutes. Pour cherries into prepared sieve, letting juices collect in bowl. Set cherries aside.

Return juices to same saucepan and bring to a simmer over medium heat. Cook until liquid is reduced to 1½ cups (it will be a thin syrup at this point), 15–20 minutes. Remove from heat, add reserved cherries, and stir in liqueur and almond extract. Transfer maraschino cherries to jar, cover, and chill at least 24 hours before using.
Do Ahead: Cherries can be made 2 weeks ahead. Keep chilled.
Whisk yogurt, sour cream, powdered sugar, and salt in a large bowl until smooth; fold in meringue cookies.
Layer maraschino cherries, fresh cherries, and yogurt mixture into 8 glasses, dividing evenly.

marvelous-maple-pumpkin-pie.name: Marvelous Maple Pumpkin Pie
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line 2 deep-dish pie plates with crusts.

Mix pumpkin puree, brown sugar, pumpkin pie spice, cinnamon, maple extract, rum extract, and salt together in a large bowl until well blended. Stir in maple syrup. Sprinkle flour over mixture. Pour in evaporated milk and stir to fully blend.
Whisk eggs together in a medium bowl for 1 to 2 minutes. Whisk eggs thoroughly into the pumpkin mixture, but do not beat. Pour pie filling into the crusts.
Bake in the center of the preheated oven until centers appear set and no longer jiggle, 60 to 70 minutes. Allow to cool thoroughly before serving.

masala-liqueur-with-citrus-fruits-argiro.name: Masala Liqueur With Citrus Fruits
instructions: For citrus masala liqueur, wash the fruits very well and remove the peel with a thin knife to avoid the white spot (petsa) that sours the liquors.
In a glass vessel that closes airtightly we put all the materials together.
Leave them for 20 days, shaking the glass vessel from time to time.
When the 20-day period passes, we strain it with folded tulpani and divide it into bottles of liquor

mashed-potato-stuffed-meatloaf-cups.name: Mashed Potato-stuffed Meatloaf Cups
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350˚F (180˚C). Grease 10 cups of a 12-cup muffin tin with nonstick spray.

Place the potatoes into a large bowl. Add the butter, salt, pepper, Parmesan, and a splash of milk. Mash, gradually adding more milk as needed until the potatoes are the desired texture. Set aside and let cool.
Prepare the glaze by mixing together the ketchup, brown sugar, onion powder, mustard powder, and paprika in a medium bowl. Reserve half in a separate bowl to glaze once cooked.
Make the meatloaf: Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat, then add the onions and garlic. Cook until the onions are translucent and fragrant. Transfer to a bowl and let cool.
In a large bowl, combine the ground beef, salt, pepper, Worcestershire sauce, Parmesan, parsley, cooled onions and garlic, egg, bread crumbs and milk. Mix until combined.
Using a spoon or ice cream scoop, scoop the meat mixture into the prepared muffin cups.

Using your fingers, spread the meat against the sides of the cups and away from the center to create divots. Fill the divots with a small spoonful of the mashed potatoes, and cover back up with the meat mixture.
Generously brush half of the glaze on top of the meatloaf cups.
Bake for 25 minutes, brushing with more of the glaze halfway through. Remove from the oven and brush with the remaining glaze that has not been used on the raw meatloaves.
Enjoy!

mason-jar-lemon-tahini-sauce.name: Mason Jar Lemon Tahini Sauce
instructions: In a large mason jar, combine the tahini, basil, cilantro, parsley, cumin, black pepper, salt, lemon juice, honey, olive oil, and water. Shake to combine.
Store in the fridge for up to a week.
Add to a hot pan with food, or serve over salad as you wish!
Enjoy!

mastic-gum-and-chocolate-cake-lezzet.name: Mastic Gum And Chocolate Cake

ingredients.item: 2 packet drop gum vanilla (or 2 pieces forged drop gum)

instructions: 1. Take the gel small bowl and wait until 3-4 mins of water.
2. Do not forget about the half of the mouth, as it is in a large bowl with sugar and drop gum vanilla, and until it is in a large bowl.
3. Heat the cream you're hungry for a bite.
4. Mix the gel and st until it is melted and add it to the mixture, and add it to the mixer
5. Add drop r add the pot and mix push with spatula.
6. 8 cm' cake cut the cake with Thursday & place it on the base of thembers.
7. Share the health cream on the cake u and wait at the best 3 hours deep penetration.
8. By pushing the cake from the bottom to the bottom, transfer it from the mold to the service plate.
9. Slate Sauce with Walnut and ornamental fortune.

meat-dried-okra-soup-recipe-lezzet.name: Meat Dried Okra Soup Recipe

ingredients.item: 250-300 gr bird dana or lamb meat
2 tablespoon of liquid oil or olive oil
6 cups of water or broth  u
Chicken chest or but (more light and quick-fan alternative)
If you do not want to use meat, you can do an indefinite &ccedil with vegetable juice and mushroom.
Fresh bamya (shorter cooking time and provide a greener color)
Tomato porridge or freshly grated sauce
Bitter or sweet pepper for salçaroma)
If desired onions, it can be prepared only with garlic and spices
Black pepper instead of white pepper, red pepper or paprika
Cake or dry min, can add a different flavor to theorbaya
Olive oil, sunflower oil or corn oil
A more aromatic taste for butter or mixture oil can be used
Sirke (az miktarda) ile hafif asidik tat
Providing with lemon yogurt during the service

instructions: 1. Wash dry bamians and clean the stem parts.
2. Wait for 10 minutes in warm water and 10 minutes.
3. Add liquid oil to the pot and roast meat.
4. Meats add onions to change color and continue roasting.
5. Add Salç and roast 1-2 minutes.
6. Add salt, pepper and optional whip pepper.
7. Su veya et suyunu tencereye ilave edin.
8. Cook for 25-30 minutes in jealous fire until the meats were softened.
9. Add Bamyas to the pot and cook for 15-20 minutes.
10. Check the consistency of the bed, if necessary, you can add some water.
11.  Afiyet olsun.

meat-pastry-lezzet.name: Meat Pastry

ingredients.item: A little missing water from 1 cup

instructions: 1. Rest for 20 minutes by covering the whole material from the dough with a damp cloth.
2. Open the chopped dough lightly and round in 50 cm diameter and replace the melted butter.
3. Fold the dough into the two and wipe it with a damp cloth and rest for half an hour.
4. The onion and peppers of fine shore.
5. Sauce in olive oil in a pan.
6. Add the meats you've filled with the tiny meat.
7. Add tomatoes close to pee.
8. Tomatoes also taste salt and get from the stove.
9. Remove and open some big parts from the dough walnut.
10. Cover the mortar from the meat and give half a month shape.
11. 11. Transfer oil paper to the tray with mass.
12. The egg yolks to the eggs and sprinkle the poppy.
13. Bake for 20-25 minutes and serve up to 180 degrees in the oven.

meat-pie.name: Meat Pie
instructions: Lightly brush a 12" cast-iron skillet with oil. Mix beef, potatoes, onion, salt, pepper, cumin, and coriander in a large bowl until just combined. Set aside until ready to use.

Roll out 1 sheet of puff pastry on a lightly floured work surface to a 15" square. Roll dough loosely around rolling pin, then unfurl into prepared pan. Gently lift and settle dough into pan. Chill until ready to use. Flour a large piece of parchment and roll out remaining sheet of puff pastry to a 12" square. Chill until ready to use.

Whisk egg and 1 Tbsp. water in a small bowl. Fill dough in pan with meat mixture. Brush edges of dough with egg wash; reserve any remaining egg wash. Place remaining dough over meat mixture, pressing edges of dough together. Trim, leaving a 1" overhang. Do not throw away any trimmed dough; you can use it to make leaf, polka dot, or stripe decorations on top of the pie.

Fold dough about 1/2" over itself and crimp decoratively. Using the tip of a knife, cut 10–12 round vents about 1" in diameter on top of pie. If you cut out any shapes from your leftover trimmings, place them on top as well. Chill pie at least 1 hour and up to 2.

Place a sheet tray on oven rack, then place rack on bottom third of oven; preheat to 191°C. Brush entire pie with reserved egg wash and place onto preheated sheet tray. Bake pie, turning halfway through, until meat is cooked through and crust is well browned, 70–80 minutes. Let cool 30–40 minutes before slicing.

meatballs-with-sour-and-legumes-lezzet.name: Meatballs With Sour And Legumes
instructions: 1. For water water, water and cook the water pot and wait for a night.
2. Remove the water from the next day.
3. Milk for meatballs, bulgur, chopped onion, red powder pepper, pepper, reyhan, salt and gently knead by adding water.
4. Add eggs and 2 tablespoons and continue kneading.
5. Find the remaining flour of the meatballs.
6. Cook the broth, broth and keel in a pot.
7. Add meatballs and cook for 5 minutes.
8. Add boiled chickpeas, dry beans and lentils and cook for 10 minutes.
9. On the butter, visit the mined pepper and red powder pepper.
10. Serve sumak serpip.

melomacarona-with-chocolate-argiro.name: Melomacarona With Chocolate
instructions: Shake the flour with the baking powder.
In a bowl, add the oil (sun oil and olive oil), sugar, cinnamon and orange zest. Mix with wire.
Add the cognac, orange juice and soda and mix.
Add the truffle and 3/4 of flour and mix with a spoon until absorbed.
Add the remaining flour gradually, gently folding by hand. Once the materials are combined, we stop. The dough must be oily and soft.
We take dough the size of a walnut (25–30 g), make balls, make dents in the center and fill with drops of chocolate and walnut. We close the melomacron.
Place the melomakarona in two baking pans, with the compound down.
With a fork, we draw soft patterns on the surface.
Bake in a well preheated ocean, at 160°C in the air, on the medium grill, for about 25 minutes, until golden and crispy.
Let them cool completely.

mexican-paella-with-cauliflower-rice.name: Mexican Paella With Cauliflower Rice
instructions: Place a paella pan over medium-high heat. Add chorizo and cook, stirring to break up any chunks, until browned and crumbly, about 5 minutes. Add chicken; cook and stir until no longer pink in the center and the juices run clear. Transfer chicken and sausage to a plate, leaving drippings in the pan.

Reduce the heat to medium and add 2 cups of cauliflower rice. Cook and stir until cauliflower is browned slightly, about 5 minutes. Add onion, bell pepper, salt, and pepper. Stir in garlic and cook until fragrant, about 2 minutes.

Pour canned tomatoes into the pan. Add bay leaves, thyme, saffron, and basil; mix well. Return sausage and chicken back to the pan. Stir in water, tomato paste, and bouillon until well combined. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to medium-low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes.

Remove the lid and fold in peas and remaining 1 cup cauliflower rice. Place frozen tilapia fillets on top of paella mixture; cover and steam for another 10 minutes. Remove the lid and check for doneness. Gently break apart fillets with a wooden spoon and stir to incorporate chunks of fish into paella.
Place the paella pan in the center of the table and serve.

mexican-style-air-fryer-stuffed-chicken-.name: Mexican-style Air Fryer Stuffed Chicken Breasts

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place toothpicks in a small bowl and cover with water; let them soak to keep them from burning while cooking.
Mix 2 teaspoons chili powder and 2 teaspoons cumin in a shallow dish.
Preheat an air fryer to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Place chicken breast on a flat work surface. Slice horizontally through the middle. Pound each half using a kitchen mallet or rolling pin until about 1/4-inch thick.

Sprinkle each breast half equally with remaining chili powder, remaining cumin, chipotle flakes, oregano, salt, and pepper. Place 1/2 the bell pepper, onion, and jalapeño in the center of 1 breast half. Roll chicken from the tapered end upward and use 2 toothpicks to secure. Repeat with other breast, spices, and vegetables and secure with remaining toothpicks. Roll each roll-up in chili-cumin mixture in the shallow dish while drizzling with olive oil until evenly covered.
Place roll-ups in the air fryer basket with the toothpick side facing up. Set timer for 6 minutes.
Turn roll-ups over. Continue cooking in the air fryer until juices run clear and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center reads at least 74°C (74 degrees C), about 5 minutes more.
Drizzle lime juice evenly on roll-ups before serving.

minced-meat-phyllo-pouch-lezzet.name: Minced Meat Phyllo Pouch
instructions: 1. Fold a Yufka in the dör.
2. The edges of the full middle are curved 20-22 cm in diameter or cut off the mold and cut with the blade around it.
3. Get 4 round yufka piece.
4. Cut the other yufka in the same way.
5. Onion shore.
6. Girl on the liquid pan and pinken onion.
7. Add to restriction.
8. Continue roasting the water until they add salt and pepper.
9. Take two pieces of round cut yufka.
10. Add 2-3 spoons of roasted mink and 1 egg yolk.
11. 11. Close the bag in the form of the mouth and connect it with the handle of yeast.
12. This way 4 börek prepares and indexed to oiled oven tray.
12. August Bake 20-25 minutes in the oven with a pre-heated 200 degree and serve hot.

mini-pumpkin-pies.name: Mini Pumpkin Pies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Beat egg white in a small bowl until slightly frothy.

Roll each sheet of pastry out on a floured surface to roughly an 11-inch square. Use a 3-inch round cutter to cut 12 circles from each sheet of pastry. Fit a pastry crust into each mini pie pan; brush the edges with egg white.
To make the filling: Beat egg yolk and remaining 2 eggs in a medium bowl until combined. Add cream cheese, pumpkin puree, sugar, vanilla, and pumpkin pie spice; beat until smooth.
Spoon about 2 tablespoons filling into each crust.
Bake in the preheated oven until crust edges are golden brown and filling is set, about 15 minutes.
Remove from the oven and allow to cool for 15 minutes before serving.

mushroom-and-spinach-tart-with-cracker-c.name: Mushroom And Spinach Tart With Cracker Crust
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Combine whole wheat flour, all-purpose flour, flax seeds, poppy seeds, and salt in a medium bowl. Rub in olive oil. Add enough water to make a pliable dough.
Roll out dough on a floured surface and press into an 11-inch tart pan. Poke holes all over with a fork.
Bake in the preheated oven until the surface of the crust looks dry, about 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, bring a small pot of water to a boil. Add spinach and cook until wilted, 2 to 3 minutes. Drain and cool until easily handled; squeeze out all water and chop.

Heat oil in a large skillet and fry onion for 3 minutes. Add mushrooms and continue sauteeing until tender, about 5 minutes. Transfer to a bowl. Mix in spinach, sour cream, feta cheese, egg, marjoram, salt, and pepper. Spread the filling over the prebaked tart crust.
Reduce the oven temperature to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Bake tart until the center is set, about 50 minutes.

mussel-cream-with-puff-pastry-for-christ.name: Mussel Cream With Puff Pastry For Christmas
mussel-cream-with-puff-pastry-for-christ.original_name: Crema de mejillones con hojaldre para Navidad

ingredients.item: 1 vaso de tomate frito (200 ml aprox.)
2 vasos de caldo de pescado (400 ml aprox.)
2 cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra

instructions: We put in a casserole 2 tablespoons of extra virgin olive oil and we revoke 2 leeks and 4 dung carrots. When they start to get golden, we add 1 tablespoon of flour, mix well and let them cook a minute to remove the raw flavour.

We put 5 cans of mussel into the drained natural, 2 cups of fish stock and 1 glass of fried tomato, and mix well. We added a pinch of ground black salt and pepper to suit. We cook with medium heat about 15 minutes, stirring from time to time.
We cross with a mixer and get a smooth and homogenous cream.
Servimos la crema caliente en cuencos o soperas individuales.
We cut 1 sheet of paddle into a slightly bigger circle than the cream containers. We put the circles onto the ponds and brush with 1 broken egg.
We baked at 180 ° C for about 15 minutes, till the paddle's golden and crispy. We serve with care as the cream remains very hot

mustard-mousse-for-ham.name: Mustard Mousse For Ham
instructions: Dissolve gelatin in 2 tablespoons cold water in a small bowl; transfer to a blender. Add sugar, vinegar, ⅓ cup water, mustard powder, and salt to blender; blend until smooth. Add eggs; blend until smooth.
Place a mixing bowl over a pot of boiling water; pour mustard mixture into bowl. Cook and stir until thick like a custard. Remove from heat; cool completely.
Beat heavy cream in a separate bowl with an electric mixer until soft peaks form. Fold whipped cream into mustard mixture.
Lightly grease a 1-quart ring mold; pour in mustard-cream mixture. Chill in refrigerator 8 hours to overnight. Serve with ham.

mustard-baked-chicken.name: Mustard-baked Chicken
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400˚F.

In a large bowl, toss all the ingredients together and allow the chicken to marinate for 15 minutes in the refrigerator. Transfer the chicken to a baking dish and spoon any excess marinade over it. Bake for 20 to 30 minutes, or until a nice brown crust forms on top of the meat. Serve warm.

10-minute-healthy-donabe-stew.name: 10-minute Healthy Donabe Stew

ingredients.prep: and seafood (shrimp, mussels, clams), meatballs, fish cakes - seared as desired
(shitake, shimeji, enoki, oyster), bok choy, cabbage, turnips, carrots
jalapeńo or serrano peppers, bean sprouts, scallions, cilantro, seaweed
(a Japanese pot great for one-serving meals) or a generic pot

instructions: In a donabe or small pot, bring chicken broth, water, and white miso to a boil at high heat.
Reduce to medium/low heat and add your proteins. Simmer for 3 minutes or more, depending on how long your protein takes to cook.
Add the vegetables and egg (optional) and simmer for 3-4 minutes.
Turn the heat off, and add salt or soy sauce to your taste.
Sprinkle with toppings and you're done!
Enjoy!
